utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Is not there a national football league .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yes . Yes , there is , they play on Sundays and Monday nights .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh shoot ! I work Monday nights .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Umm , this stuffing is amazing . Do you think we should bring them some ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: When they are hungry enough , they will come in .
